title: Arkansas vs Arizona: Channel, Streaming Info and Game Time for 247Sports Fans Revealed
body:
As the NCAA Men's Basketball Tournament continues to heat up, a highly anticipated matchup is set to take place on Thursday night at the SAP Center in San Jose, California. The No. 4-seeded Arkansas Razorbacks will face off against the top-seeded Arizona Wildcats in the Sweet 16 round, with the winners advancing to the Elite Eight. This showdown pits two of the country's top teams against each other, with Arkansas looking to pull off a major upset against a dominant Arizona squad.

The Arkansas Razorbacks, led by coach Eric Musselman, have been a force to be reckoned with in recent years. This season, they finished with a 28-8 record, including a 13-5 mark in the Southeastern Conference. Their impressive performance has earned them a spot in the Sweet 16, where they will look to make a deep run in the tournament. Arkansas has a talented roster, featuring players like Ricky Council IV, Davion Bradford, and Jordan Walsh, who have all contributed to the team's success.

On the other side of the bracket, the Arizona Wildcats have been a dominant force all season long. With a 34-2 record, including a 16-2 mark in the Big 12 Conference, they have established themselves as one of the top teams in the country. Led by coach Tommy Lloyd, Arizona boasts a talented roster that features players like Bennedict Mathurin, Oumar Ballo, and Christian Koloko. These players have been instrumental in the team's success, and they will be looking to continue their dominance against the Razorbacks.

As the two teams prepare to face off, fans will be eager to tune in and watch the action unfold. For those looking to catch the game on television, it will be broadcast on a major network, with the exact channel and start time to be announced in the coming days. Alternatively, fans can stream the game online through various platforms, including the NCAA March Madness Live website and mobile app. This will provide a convenient option for those who may not have access to a television or prefer to watch the game on their mobile device.

In addition to the on-court action, fans will also be interested in the pre-game festivities and post-game analysis. The SAP Center will be hosting a variety of events and activities, including pre-game concerts and fan gatherings. These will provide a fun and festive atmosphere for fans to enjoy before and after the game. As the teams take to the court, fans can expect a highly competitive and intense matchup, with both sides looking to come out on top.

As the Sweet 16 round comes to a close, the NCAA Men's Basketball Tournament continues to build towards its thrilling conclusion. With the Arkansas Razorbacks and Arizona Wildcats set to face off on Thursday night, fans can expect a highly entertaining matchup that will have implications for the rest of the tournament. Whether you're cheering on Arkansas or Arizona, one thing is certain – this game will be one for the ages. With the stakes high and the talent on display, Thursday night's matchup is shaping up to be one of the most exciting games of the tournament so far.
